title: Implement CLI binary with hook, test, and packs modes
description: Implement cmd/dcg-go/main.go (subcommand routing), hook.go (Claude Code PreToolUse JSON protocol, LimitReader, input parsing, Bash-only filter, decision mapping, buildReason, writeHookOutput), test.go (flags, human/JSON output, exit codes), packs.go (listing). CLI unit tests.
